examples: Thomas, of course, was cool and aloof and imperturbable.
The doctor's indignation was wholly lost on his imperturbable rival.
Her hands suddenly came together-her right and left hands each doing their own imperturbable thing-just like that.
They were invariably polite, but what was going on behind their imperturbable features?
The kinesthetic quality of the F12 is therefore that of a supremely civilized, well-tempered GT: easy to drive, supple, frictionless, balanced, undertaxed, impeccable, imperturbable.
